protocolDetails: Define the conceptual scope, inclusion criteria, outcomes, mechanisms, and identification/data features that matter.

criteria.name: topic_relevance
criteria.instructions: Include papers directly related to the research question.

criteria.name: outcome_relevance
criteria.instructions: Include papers that study the focal outcome or a close proxy.

questions.name: methodology
questions.instructions: Summarize empirical design, identification strategy, model, or theory setup.

questions.name: treatment_or_shock
questions.instructions: Summarize the treatment, shock, exposure, or explanatory variable.

questions.name: outcome_context
questions.instructions: Summarize the outcome and how it is measured.

questions.name: mechanisms_and_moderators
questions.instructions: Summarize mechanisms, channels, heterogeneity, or moderators.
